<!-- Flywheel Standard §3 — keep it short. Stamped into every repo as .github/pull_request_template.md -->

## What
<!-- One or two lines: what changed. -->

## Why
<!-- The reason / the signal or gate this serves. Link the demand signal or issue if there is one. -->

## Proof
<!-- The ONE runnable check that fails if this logic breaks (test name, or the command + result).
     Screenshots for UI changes. -->

---
- [ ] Green CI (typecheck · test · build)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (TDD; persona-journey test for a new primary journey)
- [ ] Portfolio record updated if a stage/gate/link changed
